rationale: Trump's Iran diplomatic pivot and cancelled strikes sustain concern that US attention and resources may shift away from Ukraine aid, keeping aid uncertainty elevated.

top_events.title: Trump cancels Iran strikes, claims peace deal
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy focused on Iran deal; this risks reducing political bandwidth and urgency for Ukraine military support, a persistent concern for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Gaza overnight
top_events.summary: Ongoing Gaza conflict competes for Western attention and resources; indirect negative signal for Ukraine aid prioritization.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia (ongoing)
top_events.summary: War continues on Ukrainian territory; no new qualitative escalation reported this cycle.
